output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?team1Label ?team2Label ?date WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q23945626 ; wdt:P585 ?date ; wdt:P1164 ?team1 ; wdt:P1165 ?team2 .
  ?team1 rdfs:label ?team1Label .
  ?team2 rdfs:label ?team2Label .
  FILTER(LANG(?team1Label) = "en" && LANG(?team2Label) = "en")
  .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?date)
LIMIT 1
output.answer: The current World Series features the Los Angeles Dodgers and New York Yankees, taking place from October 25 to November 1, 2023.
